headline: The Bull Case For Veralto (VLTO) Could Change Following Its Removal From Key Russell Growth Indices
summary: In late June 2026, Veralto Corporation (NYSE: VLTO) was removed from several Russell growth and defensive indices, including the Russell 1000 Growth and Russell 3000 Growth benchmarks, triggering forced portfolio adjustments by index-tracking funds. At the same time, active managers such as Artisan Mid Cap Value Fund have begun building positions, attracted by Veralto’s recurring revenue profile, regulatory niches, and perceived disconnect between its business quality and recent...
